title: core: extract keyfile module (load_identity, encrypt/decrypt)
description:
What: Extract identity keyfile functions from cli/src/commands.rs into core/src/keyfile.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Create core/src/keyfile.rs with:
   - pub fn load_identity(keyfile_path: &str, no_passphrase: bool) -> Result<Identity>
   - pub fn decrypt_keyfile(ciphertext: &[u8], passphrase: &str) -> Result<[u8; 64]>
   - pub fn encrypt_keyfile(seed: &[u8; 64], passphrase: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>>
2. Add pub mod keyfile; to core/src/lib.rs
3. In cli/src/commands.rs: replace function bodies with calls to nie_core::keyfile::*
4. Add age, rpassword to core/Cargo.toml deps (already workspace deps)
5. cargo test -p nie-core && cargo test -p nie-cli

Defensive:
- validate bytes.len() == 64 with descriptive error (not panic)
- never log identity bytes
- fn decrypt_keyfile validates ciphertext before passing to age decryptor

Agent team: I (implementer). V (validator) runs full cargo test --workspace.
Tests: existing cli tests still pass; new unit tests in core verify load roundtrip with no_passphrase=true
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace passes; no new unwrap() without explanatory comment in keyfile.rs
